overview: Happy Saturday! Today is your date with Squilliam in Bradenton (8 AM – 10 PM) — enjoy it fully. Only 1 unread email in inbox (Kit weekly digest, non-urgent). Upload Outscraper leads at 7 AM before you head out — pressure washing, pool cleaning, and competitor city CSVs ready. This is a light day by design. Revenue sits at ~$2,798 of $10,417 (27%) with 10 days left in March. Monday is your VMC Weekend Sprint day — 12 Notion tasks created for the VMC photoshoot prep at 2 PM. Nancy Pile-Griffin is now 31 days without a reply — scheduled for Thursday. Nakeitha/Nikki Nyx discovery call booked via HoneyBook for Friday Mar 27 at 1 PM. Clay's March newsletter and bound presentation are both overdue — Monday work block. Rooks in-office Tue & Thu, remote Wed this week.

alerts.title: Nancy Pile-Griffin — 31 Days Without Reply
alerts.desc: Nancy replied Feb 19 saying committee likes mockups and Pastor Dan Kim wants to work with Faye directly. She's Clay's wife — this $300+ warm referral is going ice cold. Reply scheduled Thursday after Rooks.

alerts.desc: Condensed bound presentation from branded guidelines + 10-Year Strategic Vision doc revisions with larger font. $500 rush fee revenue. Critical for Monday.

alerts.desc: Quarterly invoicing due end of March. Include $300-500 rush fee for Strategic Vision doc. Scheduled for Thursday morning before Rooks.

alerts.desc: Staff headshots & facility photography at VMC Lakewood Ranch. Weekend Sprint tasks prepping the site pages — 12 revision tasks in Notion. Wendy quick tasks bundled before photoshoot (12:15–1 PM).

alerts.desc: HoneyBook-booked session. Topics: gallery walkthrough, blog posting discussion, general check-in. Prep meeting brief Thursday evening.
